/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-indicators/indicator-sound/src=/usr/src/debug/indicator-sound -flto=auto -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gmenuharness-shared.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libgmenuharness-shared.so -o libgmenuharness-shared.so "CMakeFiles/gmenuharness-shared.dir/MatchResult.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gmenuharness-shared.dir/MatchUtils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gmenuharness-shared.dir/MenuItemMatcher.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gmenuharness-shared.dir/MenuMatcher.cpp.o"
